emails.subject: Sorry to bug you
emails.body: Sorry to bug you Every time I've come by your office this morning, you've been on the phone so I hate to bug you when I know you are swamped but are we going to be able to do any more of the ISDA stuff today? I have a conference call at 3:30 this afternoon that will be 1-2 hours and then I am flying home tomorrow so will be leaving the office around noon tomorrow.

emails.subject: Sorry to bug you

emails.subject: Re: Sorry to bug you
emails.body: Re: Sorry to bug you How about this afternoon, right after lunch, before I start getting phone calls! Greg Johnston 05/18/2000 11:23 AM
